query:
SELECT COUNT(*) as total_chinese_users FROM users 
WHERE 
  email LIKE '%.cn' 
  OR email LIKE '%@qq.com' 
  OR email LIKE '%@163.com' 
  OR email LIKE '%@126.com'
  OR email LIKE '%@sina.com'
  OR name REGEXP '[\\u4e00-\\u9fa5]';
